---
title: "Project Title"
subtitle: "Brief subtitle"
author: "Author"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

## Background

- Context and motivation
- Key question

## Data & Methods

- Dataset:
- Key tools / pipeline:

## Results

![](../results/figs/placeholder.png){fig-alt="placeholder"}

## Conclusions

- Finding 1
- Finding 2

## Next steps

-
